blocks.text: Large Gift Boxes
Oversized Rigid, Paper and Carton Gift Boxes for Retail, Hampers and Premium Packaging
Introduction

Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures large-format gift boxes for premium retail, apparel, seasonal hampers, promotional sets, and corporate gifting.Our factories in Vietnam and China produce oversized rigid boxes, large folding cartons, and large corrugated gift boxes with reinforced corners and engineering optimized for size and weight.
All manufacturing follows FSC®, ISO 9001, SMETA and GMI color calibration standards to ensure stability, durability and consistent printing across large surfaces.
High-Strength Construction
Built with reinforced greyboard or corrugated materials for heavy load support.
Premium Presentation
Large-format surfaces allow luxury finishing and impactful branding.
Export-Ready Engineering
Designed for hampers, apparel sets, promotional kits and international gifting programs.
Large Gift Box Types
Oversized Rigid Boxes
Large Folding Carton Boxes
Large Carton Gift Boxes (Corrugated)

Large rigid boxes made with thick greyboard for maximum durability and premium shelf presence.Suitable for gift hampers, apparel sets, premium food packaging, promotional kits and retail displays.Available with magnetic closures, drawer structures, book-style designs and two-piece lid-and-base formats.

Paperboard gift boxes engineered for lightweight, oversized retail packaging.Offset printed and laminated with matte, gloss or soft-touch finishes.Ideal for clothing sets, accessories, artisanal products and seasonal retail presentations.

Corrugated gift boxes using B, E, BE or BC flute combinations for superior strength.Suitable for shipping hampers, heavy items and e-commerce gifting programs.Available with custom offsets, tear strips and reinforced bases.
Two-Piece Lid and Base Boxes
Collapsible Large Boxes
Classic lid-and-base design scaled to large formats.Features reinforced walls and clean edges for premium retail display.Suitable for promotional sets, luxury goods and merchandising kits.
Flat-packed large rigid boxes that reduce shipping volume significantly.Equipped with magnetic side panels or reinforced folding mechanisms.Ideal for export programs and global e-commerce shipments.
Materials & Construction

Large rigid boxes use greyboard thicknesses ranging from 2.0 mm to 3.0 mm depending on size and weight.Paper wrapping options include art paper, kraft paper, textured paper, specialty papers and fabric-style veneers.Structural CAD development ensures accurate panel alignment, load distribution and corner stability.
Sustainability

Large boxes can be produced with FSC-certified greyboard, recycled kraft materials, water-based inks and low-VOC coatings.All production sites adhere to ISO 9001 and SMETA protocols for sustainable and compliant manufacturing.
Get a Quote for Your Large Box Project
Our engineering team provides structural drawings, prototype sampling and production planning for large gift box projects.Contact us for custom quotations and export packaging support.
